00020 
00021 package javax.microedition.io;
00022 
00023 import java.io.DataInputStream;
00024 import java.io.DataOutputStream;
00025 import java.io.IOException;
00026 import java.io.InputStream;
00027 import java.io.OutputStream;
00028 
00029 import jelatine.cldc.io.Protocol;
00030 import jelatine.cldc.io.URL;
00031 
00035 public class Connector
00036 {
00040     public final static int READ  = 1;
00041 
00045     public final static int WRITE = 2;
00046 
00050     public final static int READ_WRITE = 3;
00051     
00052     private final static String PROTOCOL_PATH_KEY = "javax.microedition.io.Connector.protocolpath";
00053     
00054     private final static String DEFAULT_PROTOCOL_PATH = "jelatine.cldc.io";
00055 
00059     private Connector()
00060     {
00061     }
00062 
00074     public static Connection open(String name) throws IllegalArgumentException,
00075         ConnectionNotFoundException, IOException, SecurityException
00076     {
00077         Connection c = open(name, READ_WRITE);
00078 
00079         return c;
00080     }
00081 
00094     public static Connection open(String name, int mode)
00095         throws IllegalArgumentException, ConnectionNotFoundException,
00096             IOException, SecurityException
00097     {
00098         return open(name, mode, false);
00099     }
00100 
00115     public static Connection open(String name, int mode, boolean timeouts)
00116         throws IllegalArgumentException, ConnectionNotFoundException,
00117             IOException, SecurityException
00118     {
00119         if ((name == null) || (mode < 1 || mode > 3))
00120             throw new IllegalArgumentException();
00121 
00122         // Parse URL
00123         URL url = new URL(name);
00124         
00125         // Get the protocol implementation class
00126         String protocolPath = System.getProperty(PROTOCOL_PATH_KEY);
00127         if (protocolPath == null) {
00128             protocolPath = DEFAULT_PROTOCOL_PATH;
00129         }
00130         
00131         String protocolClassName = protocolPath + "." + url.getScheme() + ".ProtocolImpl";
00132         Protocol protocolImpl = null;
00133         try {
00134             Class protocolClass = Class.forName(protocolClassName);
00135             protocolImpl = (Protocol)protocolClass.newInstance();
00136         } catch (Exception e) {
00137             throw new ConnectionNotFoundException("Unknown Protocol: " + url.getScheme());
00138         }
00139         
00140         // Now really open the connection
00141         Connection connection = protocolImpl.open(url, mode, timeouts);
00142 
00143         return connection;
00144     }
00145 
00157     public static DataInputStream openDataInputStream(String name)
00158         throws IllegalArgumentException, ConnectionNotFoundException,
00159             IOException, SecurityException
00160     {
00161         InputConnection connection = (InputConnection)
00162             Connector.open(name, Connector.READ);
00163 
00164         DataInputStream stream;
00165 
00166         try
00167         {
00168             stream = connection.openDataInputStream();
00169             return stream;
00170         }
00171         finally
00172         {
00173             connection.close();
00174         }
00175     }
00176 
00188     public static DataOutputStream openDataOutputStream(String name)
00189         throws IllegalArgumentException, ConnectionNotFoundException,
00190             IOException, SecurityException
00191     {
00192         OutputConnection connection = (OutputConnection)
00193             Connector.open(name, Connector.WRITE);
00194 
00195         DataOutputStream stream;
00196 
00197         try
00198         {
00199             stream = connection.openDataOutputStream();
00200             return stream;
00201         }
00202         finally
00203         {
00204             connection.close();
00205         }
00206     }
00207 
00219     public static InputStream openInputStream(String name)
00220         throws IllegalArgumentException, ConnectionNotFoundException,
00221             IOException, SecurityException
00222     {
00223         return openDataInputStream(name);
00224     }
00225 
00237     public static OutputStream openOutputStream(String name)
00238         throws IllegalArgumentException, ConnectionNotFoundException,
00239             IOException, SecurityException
00240     {
00241         return openDataOutputStream(name);
00242     }
00243     
00244 }
00245
